versions.version_description: The other here have Gm and miss the C/E. Formatting was wrong too.
Complete and well-aligned / short tab for main riff / version for acoustic guitar / suggestions for playable voicings / https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vLom-87AmO8.
Chords, as played by piano, with more specific bass notes. The original key is C, this is F (easier for female vocalists).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Dm[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]Gm[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Dm[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] |


[Verse 1]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I was tired of my lady,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
we'd been together too long[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
like a worn out recording[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
of a favorite song[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
So while she lay there sleepin'[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I read the paper in bed[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
and in the personal columns[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
there was this letter I read[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
If you like piña coladas[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and gettin' caught in the rain[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
if you're not into yoga[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
if you have half a brain [/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
if you like makin' love at midnight[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
in the dunes of a cape[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
then I'm the love that you've looked for[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
write to me and escape[/tab]


[ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Dm[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]Gm[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Dm[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] |


[Verse 2]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I didn't think about my lady,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I know that sounds kind of mean[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
But me and my old lady[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
had fallen into the same old dull routine[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
So I wrote to the paper,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
took out a personal ad[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
And though I'm nobody's poet, [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I thought it wasn't half bad[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Yes, I like piña coladas[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and getting caught in the rain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I'm not much into health food,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I am into champagne[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I've got to meet you by tomorrow noon[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and cut through all this red tape[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
At a bar called O'Malley's[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
where we'll plan our escape[/tab]


[ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Dm[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]Gm[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Dm[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] |


[Verse 3]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
So I waited with high hopes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and she walked in the place[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I knew her smile in an instant,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I knew the curve of her face[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
It was my own lovely lady[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and she said, "Aw, it's you."[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Then we laughed for a moment[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and I said, "I never knew."[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
That you like piña coladas[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and gettin' caught in the rain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
And the feel of the ocean[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
and the taste of champagne[/tab]

[tab]                [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
If you like making love at midnight[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
in the dunes on the cape[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
You're the lady I've looked for,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
come with me and escape[/tab]
